cards.title: User Groups — Documentation
cards.author: Ashish
cards.desc: Comprehensive text documentation expanding upon the user groups question framework.

cards.title: User Groups — Question Framework v2
cards.author: Ashish
cards.desc: Interactive mindmap of the v2 user groups question framework, visualising how different user types interact with TMS Insights.

cards.title: TMS Insights — Product Overview
cards.author: UX Team
cards.desc: High-level product documentation covering the full redesign journey — from initial site work to the current vision. Captures where we are leading on a product level and the direction for future developments.

cards.title: Grant Intelligence — Glossary
cards.author: UX Team
cards.desc: Complete terminology reference for the Grant Intelligence suite. Defines all key terms, program names, and acronyms used across HSIP, SS4A, and TMS grant workflows.

cards.title: TMS Insights — Redesign Brief
cards.author: UX Team
cards.desc: Official redesign brief for the TMS Insights platform. Outlines scope, design direction, and product goals for the current redesign cycle.

links.name: Netlify — tms.dezinardo.com
links.notes: Live deployment of TMS Insights project hub

links.notes: Figma file — Map prototype screens for TMS Insights redesign

cards.title: Concord Collision Safety Dashboard — v6
cards.author: Abhishek
cards.desc: Latest iteration of the Concord collision safety dashboard with refined layout, updated KPIs, and enhanced data storytelling.

cards.title: Concord Collision Comparison — 2015–2025
cards.author: Abhishek
cards.desc: 10-year collision trend dashboard comparing safety outcomes from 2015 to 2025 across severity, location, and contributing factors.

cards.title: Concord Collision Safety Dashboard — v2
cards.author: Abhishek
cards.desc: Alternate MSN-style dashboard with Overview, HIN, Compare, Story, AI Insights, and Map tabs.

cards.title: AI Insights Engine — v2.0
cards.author: Ashish
cards.desc: First wide-coded version highlighting the enforcement gap and impression gap. Post-PMMS insights build with advanced quantum measures analytics for Concord.

cards.title: TMS Insights — Concord v2
cards.author: UX Team
cards.desc: Revised TMS Insights interface for Concord — updated layout, navigation, and data views reflecting the v2 design direction.

cards.title: Concord TMS — Map Concept v1
cards.author: UX Team
cards.desc: Map layout with all layers toggleable. First version of map concepts for Concord TMS.

cards.title: City District Explorer
cards.author: UX Team
cards.desc: District-level exploration of Concord's city boundaries, enabling drill-down into neighbourhood-specific collision and safety data.

cards.title: Concord City Outline Map
cards.author: UX Team
cards.desc: Clean city outline map of Concord, CA — used as a base layer reference for spatial overlays and design mockups.

cards.title: Corridor Explorer — v2
cards.author: UX Team
cards.desc: Most insightful corridor view with an embedded explorer, AI chat suggestion bubbles, and a detailed intersection profile panel.

cards.title: Concord KSI Hexmap
cards.author: Lakshan
cards.desc: Collision heatmap broken down by severity and contributing factors. Distinct UI style — one of the more experimental visual approaches in the set.

cards.title: Spatial Risk Intelligence
cards.author: UX Team
cards.desc: Nav-preserved version of TMS Live with map intelligence retooled for spatial risk analysis.

cards.title: Corridor Explorer — Dark/Purple
cards.author: UX Team
cards.desc: Dark-themed alternate interface built upon the foundational Corridor Explorer view.

cards.title: Corridor Explorer — Dark Purple Layout
cards.author: UX Team
cards.desc: Alternative dark purple layout for the Corridor Explorer, exploring a deeper colour palette and refined typography treatment.

cards.title: HSIP Intelligence Module
cards.author: Abhishek
cards.desc: California Highway Safety Improvement Program intelligence dashboard — covering funding cycles, eligible projects, performance measures, and Concord-specific HSIP application insights.

cards.title: ATP Intelligence Module
cards.author: Abhishek
cards.desc: Active Transportation Program intelligence module — covering ATP funding history, eligible project types, cycle analysis, and Concord-specific active transport grant strategy.

cards.title: SS4A FY2026 Grant Compliance Dashboard
cards.author: Abhishek
cards.desc: Safe Streets and Roads for All (SS4A) FY2026 compliance dashboard for the City of Concord — tracking action plan requirements, deliverables, and submission readiness.

cards.title: Grant Intelligence Map
cards.author: UX Team
cards.desc: Map-level grant analysis covering funding history, before/after impact, and Cycle 13 gap analysis across investments vs. incidents. Includes a what-if simulator driven by programs and packages, with a PDF export for ready-to-submit applications.

cards.title: Grant Intelligence Module
cards.author: Abhishek
cards.desc: Historical grant intelligence for Concord — covering Cycles 8–12 funding trajectory, HSIP application log, countermeasure budget trends, SS4A strategy, and Cycle 13 gap analysis with recommendations.

cards.title: Grant Package — Dark Theme
cards.author: UX Team
cards.desc: Dark-themed grant package view for TMS Insights, presenting grant recommendations, countermeasure packages, and submission materials in a polished alternate visual style.

cards.title: Countermeasure Selector — v1
cards.author: UX Team
cards.desc: Traffic safety engineering tool for selecting and evaluating countermeasures by location, crash type, and severity. Supports grant application package building.

cards.title: Vision Layout — Grant Dashboard
cards.author: Ashish
cards.desc: Map-based grant dashboard with two core modes — Simulation and Analysis. Select countermeasures, run corridor simulations, review outcomes, and generate a ready grant package.
